channel.title: Extensional tectonics on VBOX
channel.description: Recent content in Extensional tectonics on VBOX

item.title: Rigid basement, Extensional tectonics
item.description: download： detachment.py | init_xyr.dat There are the upper and lower rigid plates in this examples. extens_rigid.py and init_xyr.dat need to be in the same directory. The contents of extens_rigid.py are as follows: #2019-06-29 #建议使用notepad++查看本文件 #LI ChangSheng
